name: Best Ever Chinese Chicken
recipeIngredient: 4 halves skinless boneless chicken breasts, cut into pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine chicken with corn starch and soy sauce. Stir well and let sit for at least 5 minutes.
2. Prepare all ingredients ahead of time, including the sauce mixture (see below).
3. Heat oil in a large frying pan or wok over medium-high heat. Add chicken and quickly stir-fry until cooked through, about 2-3 minutes. Remove chicken from the pan and set aside on a plate.
4. Add sliced green pepper and mushrooms to the pan and stir-fry for 2 minutes.
5. Add pea pods and nuts, then continue stir-frying for another 2 minutes.
6. Add ginger and cayenne to the pan. Return chicken to the pan with vegetables, add sauce, and stir.
7. Cover skillet and cook over medium heat for 5 minutes.
8. Serve over boiled white rice. Makes 4-6 servings.
Sauce:
In a small bowl, combine all ingredients and mix thoroughly.
